{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine (Teragaya, Nijō, Minamiizu Town, Shizuoka Prefecture)'''|静岡県賀茂郡南伊豆町二條字寺ヶ谷 山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine (Teragaya, Nijō, Minamiizu Town, Shizuoka Prefecture)'''|静岡県賀茂郡南伊豆町二條字寺ヶ谷 山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yamanokami'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine (Teragaya, Nijō, Minamiizu Town, Shizuoka Prefecture)'''|静岡県賀茂郡南伊豆町二條字寺ヶ谷 山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yamanokami'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine (Teragaya, Nijō, Minamiizu Town, Shizuoka Prefecture)'''|静岡県賀茂郡南伊豆町二條字寺ヶ谷 山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yama‑no‑Kami Shrine'''|山ノ神}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
